# MobileDriversLicenseDataRequest.Response.DocumentElements.AAMVADrivingPrivilege.VehicleClass

**Structure**

An object that represents the driving privilege vehicle class.

## Declaration

```swift
struct VehicleClass
```

## Instance Properties

- **code**: The code of the vehicle class privilege.
- **description**: The description of the vehicle class privilege.
- **expirationDate**: The expiration date of the vehicle class privilege.
- **issueDate**: The issue date of the vehicle class privilege.
